---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
    output-file: index.html
    toc: false
    theme: none
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
        <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
        <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Nunito:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;0,700;0,800;1,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
library(readxl)
library(reactable)
library(htmltools)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(glue)
library(crosstalk)
library(tidyr)
library(htmlwidgets)
library(jsonlite)

`%||%` <- function(x, y) if (is.null(x) || length(x) == 0 || (length(x) == 1 && is.na(x))) y else x

EXCEL_CANDIDATES <- c(
  "EGRA_Harmonization_Waves_Details.xlsx",
  file.path("data", "EGRA_Harmonization_Waves_Details.xlsx")
)
EXCEL_PATH <- EXCEL_CANDIDATES[file.exists(EXCEL_CANDIDATES)][1]

PUBLISH_DIR <- Sys.getenv("AFLEARN_PUBLISH_DIR", unset = "docs")
STUDIES_DIR <- file.path(PUBLISH_DIR, "studies")
dir.create(STUDIES_DIR, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

HARMONISED_DATA_URL <- "https://www.datafirst.uct.ac.za/dataportal/index.php"
AF_NAVY_L1 <- "#080056"  # logo bar (darkest layer)
AF_NAVY_L2 <- "#100A78"  # header / hero (lighter navy)
AF_NAVY    <- "#06003E"  # body text / accents
AF_GOLD    <- "#C8892A"
AF_BLUE    <- "#1B6FD8"

format_grades <- function(sheet_val, file_val = NA_character_) {
  if (!is.na(sheet_val) && sheet_val != "") {
    val <- tolower(trimws(as.character(sheet_val)))
    m <- str_match_all(val, "g(\\d+)")[[1]]
    if (nrow(m) > 0) {
      nums <- sort(unique(as.integer(m[, 2])))
      return(paste(nums, collapse = ", "))
    }
  }
  from_file <- grades_from_filename(file_val)
  if (!is.na(from_file) && from_file != "") {
    return(normalize_grades(from_file))
  }
  "—"
}

grades_from_filename <- function(text) {
  if (is.na(text) || text == "" || text == "—") return(NA_character_)
  m <- str_match(text, "(?i)grades?[_ ]+([0-9]+(?:[,\\s]+[0-9]+)*)")
  if (!is.na(m[1, 2])) return(m[1, 2])
  m2 <- str_match_all(text, "(?i)grade[_ ]?(\\d+)")[[1]]
  if (nrow(m2) > 0) return(paste(m2[, 2], collapse = ", "))
  NA_character_
}

normalize_grades <- function(...) {
  vals <- list(...)
  vals <- vals[!vapply(vals, function(x) is.na(x) || x == "", logical(1))]
  if (length(vals) == 0) return("—")
  nums <- unique(sort(as.integer(unlist(str_split(paste(vals, collapse = " "), "[,\\s]+")))))
  nums <- nums[!is.na(nums)]
  if (length(nums) == 0) return("—")
  paste(nums, collapse = ", ")
}

study_type_label <- function(val) {
  switch(val,
    cross_sectional = "Cross-sectional",
    school_panel    = "School panel",
    unknown         = "Unknown",
    ifelse(is.na(val) || val == "", "Unknown", val)
  )
}

# ── DataLumos project-level URLs (readxl strips hyperlinks; recovered via openpyxl) ──
# Key: paste0(ISO, "_", zero-padded project code)
# Add new entries here as datasets are deposited.
datalumos_urls <- c(
  "CD_001" = "http://doi.org/10.3886/E237081V1",
  "KE_001" = "https://www.datalumos.org/datalumos/project/237644/version/V1/view?path=/datalumos/237644/fcr:versions/V1/Kenya/Tusome&type=folder",
  "LR_001" = "https://www.datalumos.org/datalumos/project/237226/version/V1/view?path=/datalumos/237226/fcr:versions/V1/Liberia/EGRA-Plus&type=folder",
  "MW_001" = "https://www.datalumos.org/datalumos/project/237426/version/V1/view?path=/datalumos/237426/fcr:versions/V1/Malawi/Malawi-Teacher-Professional-Development-Support--MTPDS----Intervention-Study/MTPDS&type=folder",
  "RW_002" = "https://www.datalumos.org/datalumos/project/237672/version/V1/view?path=/datalumos/237672/fcr:versions/V1/Rwanda/Soma-Umenye--Read-to-Know-&type=folder",
  "RW_003" = "https://www.datalumos.org/datalumos/project/237672/version/V1/view?path=/datalumos/237672/fcr:versions/V1/Rwanda/The-Literacy-Language-and-Learning-Initiative--L3-&type=folder"
)

# ── Data file URLs keyed on source identifier ──────────────────────────────────
datafile_urls <- c(
  "drc_2015"      = "https://www.datalumos.org/datalumos/project/237081/version/V1/view?path=/datalumos/237081/fcr:versions/V1/Democratic-Republic-of-the-Congo/Acces--Lecture--Redevabilite-et-Retention--Activity-1--A-1--Project/Data/Baseline-2015-Grades-3-5-EGRA.csv&type=file",
  "kenya_2015"    = "https://www.datalumos.org/datalumos/project/237644/version/V1/view?path=/datalumos/237644/fcr:versions/V1/Kenya/Tusome/early-grade-reading-program/Data/2015-Baseline-Student-Teacher-Headteacher.csv&type=file",
  "kenya_2016"    = "https://www.datalumos.org/datalumos/project/237644/version/V1/view?path=/datalumos/237644/fcr:versions/V1/Kenya/Tusome/endline-evaluation/Data/Tusome_EGRA_Panel_Dataset.csv&type=file",
  "kenya_2019"    = "https://www.datalumos.org/datalumos/project/237644/version/V1/view?path=/datalumos/237644/fcr:versions/V1/Kenya/Tusome/endline-evaluation/Data/2._Tusome_Endline_Student_Level_DDL_Dataset.csv&type=file",
  "liberia"       = "https://www.datalumos.org/datalumos/project/237226/version/V1/view?path=/datalumos/237226/fcr:versions/V1/Liberia/EGRA-Plus/Data/2008-2010-Baseline-Midline-Endline.csv&type=file",
  "malawi"        = "https://www.datalumos.org/datalumos/project/237426/version/V1/view?path=/datalumos/237426/fcr:versions/V1/Malawi/Malawi-Teacher-Professional-Development-Support--MTPDS----Intervention-Study/MTPDS/Data/PUF-Data_Malawi_MTPDS_Baseline.csv&type=file",
  "rwanda_2018_g1"= "https://www.datalumos.org/datalumos/project/237672/version/V1/view?path=/datalumos/237672/fcr:versions/V1/Rwanda/Soma-Umenye--Read-to-Know-/2018-baseline/Data/Grade_1_EGRA_data__Soma_Umenye_2018_baseline_.csv&type=file",
  "rwanda_2018_g2"= "https://www.datalumos.org/datalumos/project/237672/version/V1/view?path=/datalumos/237672/fcr:versions/V1/Rwanda/Soma-Umenye--Read-to-Know-/2018-baseline/Data/Grade_2_EGRA_data__Soma_Umenye_2018_baseline_.csv&type=file",
  "rwanda_2018_g3"= "https://www.datalumos.org/datalumos/project/237672/version/V1/view?path=/datalumos/237672/fcr:versions/V1/Rwanda/Soma-Umenye--Read-to-Know-/2018-baseline/Data/Grade_3_EGRA_data__Soma_Umenye_2018_baseline_.csv&type=file",
  "rwanda_2014"   = "https://www.datalumos.org/datalumos/project/237672/version/V1/view?path=/datalumos/237672/fcr:versions/V1/Rwanda/The-Literacy-Language-and-Learning-Initiative--L3-/Data/PUF-Data_Rwanda_L3_Baseline.csv&type=file",
  "rwanda_2015"   = "https://www.datalumos.org/datalumos/project/237672/version/V1/view?path=/datalumos/237672/fcr:versions/V1/Rwanda/The-Literacy-Language-and-Learning-Initiative--L3-/Data/PUF-Data_Rwanda_L3_Midline-1.csv&type=file",
  "rwanda_2016"   = "https://www.datalumos.org/datalumos/project/237672/version/V1/view?path=/datalumos/237672/fcr:versions/V1/Rwanda/The-Literacy-Language-and-Learning-Initiative--L3-/Data/PUF-Data_Rwanda_L3_Endline.csv&type=file"
)

# ── Codebook URLs keyed on source identifier ───────────────────────────────────
codebook_urls <- c(
  "drc_2015"      = "https://www.datalumos.org/datalumos/project/237081/version/V1/view?path=/datalumos/237081/fcr:versions/V1/Democratic-Republic-of-the-Congo/Acces--Lecture--Redevabilite-et-Retention--Activity-1--A-1--Project/Codebooks/Baseline-2015-Grades-3-5-EGR-Codebook.xlsx&type=file",
  "kenya_2015"    = "https://www.datalumos.org/datalumos/project/237644/version/V1/view?path=/datalumos/237644/fcr:versions/V1/Kenya/Tusome/early-grade-reading-program/Codebooks/codebook_2015-Kenya-Tusome-baseline.csv&type=file",
  "kenya_2016"    = "https://www.datalumos.org/datalumos/project/237644/version/V1/view?path=/datalumos/237644/fcr:versions/V1/Kenya/Tusome/endline-evaluation/Codebooks/1._Tusome_Endline_EGRA_Panel_Codebook.xlsx&type=file",
  "kenya_2019"    = "https://www.datalumos.org/datalumos/project/237644/version/V1/view?path=/datalumos/237644/fcr:versions/V1/Kenya/Tusome/endline-evaluation/Codebooks/2._Tusome_Endline_Student_Level_Codebook.xlsx&type=file",
  "liberia"       = "https://www.datalumos.org/datalumos/project/237226/version/V1/view?path=/datalumos/237226/fcr:versions/V1/Liberia/EGRA-Plus/Codebooks/2008-2010-Baseline-Midline-Endline-Codebook.csv&type=file",
  "malawi"        = "https://www.datalumos.org/datalumos/project/237426/version/V1/view?path=/datalumos/237426/fcr:versions/V1/Malawi/Malawi-Teacher-Professional-Development-Support--MTPDS----Intervention-Study/MTPDS/Codebooks/DataProfile_Malawi_MTPDS_Baseline.pdf&type=file",
  "rwanda_2018_g1"= "https://www.datalumos.org/datalumos/project/237672/version/V1/view?path=/datalumos/237672/fcr:versions/V1/Rwanda/Soma-Umenye--Read-to-Know-/2018-baseline/Codebooks/P1_Students_Codebook.xls&type=file",
  "rwanda_2018_g2"= "https://www.datalumos.org/datalumos/project/237672/version/V1/view?path=/datalumos/237672/fcr:versions/V1/Rwanda/Soma-Umenye--Read-to-Know-/2018-baseline/Codebooks/P2_Students_Codebook.xls&type=file",
  "rwanda_2018_g3"= "https://www.datalumos.org/datalumos/project/237672/version/V1/view?path=/datalumos/237672/fcr:versions/V1/Rwanda/Soma-Umenye--Read-to-Know-/2018-baseline/Codebooks/P3_Students_Codebook.xls&type=file",
  "rwanda_2014"   = "https://www.datalumos.org/datalumos/project/237672/version/V1/view?path=/datalumos/237672/fcr:versions/V1/Rwanda/The-Literacy-Language-and-Learning-Initiative--L3-/Codebooks/DataProfile_Rwanda_L3_Baseline.pdf&type=file",
  "rwanda_2015"   = "https://www.datalumos.org/datalumos/project/237672/version/V1/view?path=/datalumos/237672/fcr:versions/V1/Rwanda/The-Literacy-Language-and-Learning-Initiative--L3-/Codebooks/DataProfile_Rwanda_L3_Midline-1.pdf&type=file",
  "rwanda_2016"   = "https://www.datalumos.org/datalumos/project/237672/version/V1/view?path=/datalumos/237672/fcr:versions/V1/Rwanda/The-Literacy-Language-and-Learning-Initiative--L3-/Codebooks/DataProfile_Rwanda_L3_Endline.pdf&type=file"
)

# ── Read projects sheet ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
projects <- read_excel(EXCEL_PATH, sheet = "Project description") |>
  filter(!is.na(country_iso) & country_iso != "") |>
  rename(
    Country      = Country,
    ISO          = country_iso,
    Project_Name = `Project Name`,
    Acronym      = `Project Acronym`,
    Code         = `Project Code`,
    Description  = `Project Description`,
    Sampling     = Sampling,
    Study_Type   = study_type,
    Study_Design = study_design,
    Harmonised_ID = `2026 EGRA Harmonisation`
  ) |>
  mutate(
    Code      = str_pad(as.character(Code), 3, pad = "0"),
    proj_key  = paste0(ISO, "_", Code),
    DataLumos = datalumos_urls[proj_key]
  )

# ── Read study rounds sheet ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
rounds_raw <- read_excel(EXCEL_PATH, sheet = "Study_rounds")

rounds <- rounds_raw |>
  filter(!is.na(country_iso) & country_iso != "") |>
  rename(
    ISO           = country_iso,
    Code          = project,
    Round         = Round,
    Year          = data_collection_year,
    Grade_sheet   = grade,
    Svyset        = svyset,
    RCT           = svy_rct,
    DataFile_text = datafile_location,
    Codebook_text = codebook_location,
    Source        = source,
    Comments      = comments
  ) |>
  mutate(
    Code          = str_pad(as.character(Code), 3, pad = "0"),
    proj_key      = paste0(ISO, "_", Code),
    Year          = as.character(Year),
    Round         = as.character(Round),
    Source        = str_trim(Source),
    across(c(RCT, Comments), ~ifelse(is.na(.) | . == "", "—", .)),
    Svyset        = ifelse(is.na(Svyset) | Svyset == "", "— not specified —", Svyset),
    DataFile_text = str_trim(ifelse(is.na(DataFile_text) | DataFile_text == "", "—", DataFile_text)),
    Codebook_text = str_trim(ifelse(is.na(Codebook_text) | Codebook_text == "", "—", Codebook_text)),
    DataFile_url  = datafile_urls[Source],
    Codebook_url  = codebook_urls[Source],
    Grades = mapply(format_grades, Grade_sheet, DataFile_text, USE.NAMES = FALSE)
  )

file_mod     <- file.info(EXCEL_PATH)$mtime
last_updated <- format(file_mod, "%d %B %Y, %H:%M")

browse_base <- rounds |>
  select(-ISO) |>
  left_join(
    projects |>
      select(proj_key, Country, ISO, Project_Name, Acronym, Study_Type, Study_Design,
             Description, Sampling, DataLumos, Harmonised_ID),
    by = "proj_key"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    Study_Name = if_else(
      !is.na(Acronym) & Acronym != "",
      paste0(Project_Name, " (", Acronym, ")"),
      Project_Name
    ),
    Study_Type = ifelse(is.na(Study_Type) | Study_Type == "", "unknown", Study_Type),
    Study_Type_Label = vapply(Study_Type, study_type_label, character(1)),
    Year = ifelse(is.na(Year) | Year == "" | Year == "`", "—", Year)
  )

browse_base <- browse_base |>
  mutate(
    base_slug = paste0(Source, "_", Code, "_r", Round),
    study_slug = ifelse(
      duplicated(base_slug) | duplicated(base_slug, fromLast = TRUE),
      paste0(base_slug, "_", ifelse(is.na(ISO) | ISO == "", "XX", ISO)),
      base_slug
    )
  ) |>
  mutate(Detail_url = paste0("studies/", study_slug, ".html"))

browse_filter <- browse_base |>
  mutate(
    Grade = if_else(
      Grades == "—",
      list("—"),
      as.list(str_split(Grades, ",\\s*"))
    )
  ) |>
  unnest_longer(Grade, keep_empty = TRUE) |>
  mutate(Grade = ifelse(is.na(Grade), "—", as.character(Grade)))

sub_tasks_raw <- read_excel(EXCEL_PATH, sheet = "sub-tasks")
task_meaning  <- read_excel(EXCEL_PATH, sheet = "task meaning")

browse_sd <- SharedData$new(browse_base, key = ~study_slug, group = "af_studies")
browse_filter_sd <- SharedData$new(browse_filter, key = ~study_slug, group = "af_studies")
n_studies <- nrow(browse_base)
```

```{r helpers}
# ── Reusable header style: force no-wrap at the colDef level ──────────────────
# This beats reactable's own inline styles, which CSS alone cannot override.
HDR_STYLE <- list(
  whiteSpace = "nowrap",
  overflow   = "visible"
)

# ── Badge ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
badge <- function(val, color_map) {
  if (is.na(val) || val == "" || val == "—")
    return(span("—", style = "color:#A0AEC0; font-size:11px;"))
  bg  <- color_map[[val]] %||% "#94A3B8"
  txt <- switch(val,
    cross_sectional = "Cross-sectional",
    school_panel    = "School panel",
    descriptive     = "Descriptive",
    pre_post        = "Pre/Post",
    rct             = "RCT",
    unknown         = "Unknown",
    val
  )
  span(txt, style = glue(
    "background:{bg}; color:#fff; font-size:10px; font-weight:600; ",
    "padding:2px 9px; border-radius:10px; letter-spacing:0.04em; ",
    "display:inline-block; line-height:1.7; white-space:nowrap;"
  ))
}

type_colors   <- list(cross_sectional = AF_NAVY, school_panel = "#7C3AED", unknown = "#94A3B8")
design_colors <- list(descriptive = "#10B981", pre_post = "#F59E0B", rct = "#EF4444", unknown = "#94A3B8")

# ── Truncated text with Read more toggle ───────────────────────────────────────
truncate_cell <- function(text, max_chars = 220) {
  if (is.na(text) || text == "—" || nchar(text) <= max_chars)
    return(div(text, style = "font-size:12px; line-height:1.6; color:#374151;"))
  uid <- paste0("tc_", sample(1e7, 1))
  div(
    span(str_sub(text, 1, max_chars), style = "font-size:12px; line-height:1.6; color:#374151;"),
    span("…", id = paste0(uid, "_ell"), style = "color:#94A3B8;"),
    span(str_sub(text, max_chars + 1),
         id = paste0(uid, "_rest"),
         style = "display:none; font-size:12px; line-height:1.6; color:#374151;"),
    tags$a("Read more", href = "#",
           onclick = glue(
             "var r=document.getElementById('{uid}_rest');",
             "var e=document.getElementById('{uid}_ell');",
             "var a=this;",
             "if(r.style.display==='none'){{r.style.display='inline';e.style.display='none';a.textContent='Show less';}}",
             "else{{r.style.display='none';e.style.display='inline';a.textContent='Read more';}}",
             "return false;"
           ),
           style = paste0("font-size:11px; color:", AF_NAVY, "; margin-left:3px; text-decoration:none; font-weight:700;"))
  )
}

# ── Link pill: used for DataLumos, Data File, and Codebook ────────────────────
link_pill <- function(url, label, color = "#3B82F6", bg = "#EFF6FF", border = "#BFDBFE") {
  if (is.na(url) || url == "" || url == "—")
    return(span("—", style = "color:#A0AEC0; font-size:11px;"))
  tags$a(label, href = url, target = "_blank",
         style = glue(
           "font-size:11px; color:{color}; font-weight:600; text-decoration:none; ",
           "white-space:nowrap; padding:2px 7px; border:1px solid {border}; ",
           "border-radius:4px; background:{bg}; display:inline-block; line-height:1.6;"
         ))
}

# ── File cell: display filename + link pill on separate lines ─────────────────
file_cell <- function(text, url) {
  if (is.na(text) || text == "—")
    return(span("—", style = "color:#A0AEC0; font-size:12px;"))
  has_url <- !is.na(url) && url != ""
  div(
    div(text, style = "font-size:13px; color:#374151; word-break:break-word; margin-bottom:3px;"),
    if (has_url) link_pill(url, "Open on DataLumos ↗", "#0F1F38", "#F0F4FF", "#C7D7F5")
  )
}

country_flag_img <- function(iso) {
  if (is.na(iso) || iso == "") return(NULL)
  iso_lower <- tolower(substr(iso, 1, 2))
  tags$img(
    src = glue("https://flagcdn.com/w40/{iso_lower}.png"),
    alt = "",
    class = "af-country-flag",
    loading = "lazy"
  )
}

country_cell <- function(country, iso) {
  div(
    class = "af-country-cell",
    country_flag_img(iso),
    span(country)
  )
}

filter_accordion <- function(label, filter_id, shared, column) {
  div(
    class = "af-filter-panel",
    tags$button(
      type = "button",
      class = "af-filter-toggle",
      `aria-expanded` = "false",
      tags$span(class = "af-filter-icon", "+"),
      tags$span(class = "af-filter-name", label)
    ),
    div(
      class = "af-filter-body af-crosstalk",
      filter_checkbox(filter_id, NULL, shared, as.formula(paste0("~", column)))
    )
  )
}

row_arrow_icon <- function() {
  HTML(paste0(
    '<svg class="af-row-arrow-svg" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" ',
    'width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true">',
    '<path d="M4 12h13" stroke="#1B6FD8" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>',
    '<path d="M13 7l6 5-6 5" fill="#1B6FD8" stroke="#1B6FD8" ',
    'stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linejoin="round"/>',
    '</svg>'
  ))
}

search_box <- div(
  class = "af-search-wrap",
  tags$input(
    type = "search",
    id = "af-study-search",
    class = "af-search-input",
    placeholder = "Search",
    autocomplete = "off"
  ),
  tags$span(
    class = "af-search-icon",
    `aria-hidden` = "true",
    HTML(paste0(
      '<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" ',
      'viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" ',
      'stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">',
      '<circle cx="11" cy="11" r="7"/><line x1="16.5" y1="16.5" x2="21" y2="21"/>',
      '</svg>'
    ))
  )
)
```

```{r header}
aflearn_logo <- knitr::image_uri("AFLEARN logo transparent.png")

div(
  div(class = "af-logobar",
    tags$img(src = aflearn_logo, class = "af-logo-aflearn", alt = "AFLearn DataHub")
  ),
  div(class = "af-header",
    div(class = "af-header-inner",
      div(class = "af-brand",
        span("Harmonised EGRA/EGMA Dataset", class = "af-page-title"),
        span("Project & Study Rounds Reference", class = "af-subtitle")
      ),
      div(class = "af-header-actions",
        tags$a(
          href = HARMONISED_DATA_URL,
          target = "_blank",
          class = "af-cta-btn",
          "Access harmonised dataset"
        ),
        div(class = "af-meta",
          span("Source file last updated", class = "af-meta-label"),
          span(last_updated, class = "af-meta-value")
        )
      )
    ),
    p(class = "af-description",
      "Browse EGRA/EGMA study rounds by country. Click a row for project details, ",
      tags$code("svyset"), " commands, and DataLumos links."
    )
  )
)
```

```{r table}
browse_filters <- div(
  class = "af-filters",
  filter_accordion("Country", "filter-country", browse_sd, "Country"),
  filter_accordion("Year", "filter-year", browse_sd, "Year"),
  filter_accordion("Grade", "filter-grade", browse_filter_sd, "Grade"),
  filter_accordion("Study type", "filter-study-type", browse_sd, "Study_Type_Label"),
  p(class = "af-filter-hint",
    glue("{n_studies} study rounds · click a row to open its detail page"))
)

browse_table <- reactable(
  browse_sd,
  elementId     = "browse-table",
  searchable    = FALSE,
  sortable      = TRUE,
  resizable     = FALSE,
  pagination    = FALSE,
  highlight     = TRUE,
  compact       = FALSE,
  defaultColDef = colDef(vAlign = "top", headerVAlign = "center",
                         headerStyle = HDR_STYLE, show = FALSE),

  theme = reactableTheme(
    backgroundColor  = "#FFFFFF",
    borderColor      = "#E5E7EB",
    highlightColor   = "#F3F4F6",
    cellPadding      = "10px 12px",
    style = list(fontFamily = "'Nunito', sans-serif", fontSize = "15px")
  ),

  columns = list(
    Country = colDef(
      name = "Country", minWidth = 200, show = TRUE,
      headerStyle = HDR_STYLE,
      cell = function(value, index) {
        iso <- browse_base[index, "ISO", drop = TRUE]
        country_cell(value, iso)
      }
    ),
    Year = colDef(
      name = "Year", width = 100, minWidth = 100, align = "center", show = TRUE,
      headerStyle = c(HDR_STYLE, list(minWidth = "100px", width = "100px")),
      style = list(
        color = AF_NAVY, fontWeight = "700",
        whiteSpace = "nowrap", fontVariantNumeric = "tabular-nums"
      )
    ),
    Study_Name = colDef(
      name = "Study name", minWidth = 280, show = TRUE,
      html = TRUE,
      headerStyle = HDR_STYLE,
      cell = function(value, index) {
        href <- browse_base$Detail_url[[index]]
        paste0(
          '<a href="', htmltools::htmlEscape(href), '" class="af-study-link" ',
          'style="color:#374151;text-decoration:none;">',
          htmltools::htmlEscape(value), "</a>"
        )
      }
    ),
    Grades = colDef(
      name = "Grade(s)", width = 130, minWidth = 130, align = "center", show = TRUE,
      headerStyle = c(HDR_STYLE, list(minWidth = "130px", width = "130px")),
      style = list(whiteSpace = "nowrap"),
      cell = function(v) {
        if (is.na(v) || v == "—")
          return(span("—", style = "color:#CBD5E0; font-size:11px;"))
        span(v, style = paste0("font-size:14px; color:", AF_NAVY, "; font-weight:700; white-space:nowrap;"))
      }
    ),
    Grade = colDef(show = FALSE),
    Study_Type_Label = colDef(show = FALSE),
    Study_Type = colDef(show = FALSE),
    Study_Design = colDef(show = FALSE),
    Project_Name = colDef(show = FALSE),
    Acronym = colDef(show = FALSE),
    Description = colDef(show = FALSE),
    Sampling = colDef(show = FALSE),
    DataLumos = colDef(show = FALSE),
    DataFile_text = colDef(show = FALSE),
    DataFile_url = colDef(show = FALSE),
    Codebook_text = colDef(show = FALSE),
    Codebook_url = colDef(show = FALSE),
    Svyset = colDef(show = FALSE),
    Source = colDef(show = FALSE),
    Round = colDef(show = FALSE),
    proj_key = colDef(show = FALSE),
    ISO = colDef(show = FALSE),
    Harmonised_ID = colDef(show = FALSE),
    RCT = colDef(show = FALSE),
    Comments = colDef(show = FALSE),
    study_slug = colDef(show = FALSE),
    Detail_url = colDef(show = FALSE),
    Row_arrow = colDef(
      name = "", width = 48, minWidth = 48, align = "center", show = TRUE,
      sortable = FALSE, searchable = FALSE, html = TRUE,
      headerStyle = HDR_STYLE,
      cell = function(v, index) {
        href <- browse_base$Detail_url[[index]]
        tags$a(href = href, style = "text-decoration:none;", row_arrow_icon())
      }
    )
  )
)

browse_table <- htmlwidgets::onRender(
  browse_table,
  "
  function(el, x) {
    var allUrls = (x.tag && x.tag.attribs && x.tag.attribs.data && x.tag.attribs.data.Detail_url) || [];
    function rowUrls() {
      if (typeof Reactable === 'undefined') return allUrls;
      var state = Reactable.getState('browse-table');
      if (state && state.data && state.data.length) {
        var fromState = state.data.map(function(r) { return r.Detail_url; });
        if (fromState[0]) return fromState;
      }
      return allUrls;
    }
    function rowUrl(row) {
      var u = row.getAttribute('data-detail-url');
      if (u) return u;
      var a = row.querySelector('a.af-study-link, a[href*=\"studies/\"]');
      return a ? a.getAttribute('href') : '';
    }
    function syncRowUrls() {
      var urls = rowUrls();
      var groups = el.querySelectorAll('.rt-tbody .rt-tr-group');
      groups.forEach(function(g, i) {
        var url = urls[i] || '';
        if (url) {
          g.style.cursor = 'pointer';
          g.setAttribute('data-detail-url', url);
        }
      });
      return groups.length > 0;
    }
    if (el.dataset.afStudyNav !== '1') {
      el.dataset.afStudyNav = '1';
      el.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
        var row = e.target.closest('.rt-tbody .rt-tr-group');
        if (!row) return;
        var url = rowUrl(row);
        if (!url) return;
        e.preventDefault();
        window.location.assign(url);
      });
    }
    var tries = 0;
    var timer = setInterval(function() {
      syncRowUrls();
      if (el.querySelectorAll('.rt-tbody .rt-tr-group').length > 0 || ++tries > 50) clearInterval(timer);
    }, 100);
    if (typeof Reactable !== 'undefined' && Reactable.onStateChange) {
      Reactable.onStateChange('browse-table', syncRowUrls);
    }
  }
  "
)

div(
  class = "af-layout",
  div(
    class = "af-sidebar",
    search_box,
    div(
      class = "af-sidebar-title",
      "Filter Results ",
      span(class = "af-sidebar-count", glue("({n_studies})"))
    ),
    browse_filters
  ),
  div(
    class = "af-main",
    div(class = "af-main-title", "Study Rounds"),
    browse_table
  )
)
```

```{r generate-study-pages}
source("aflearn_study_pages.R")
study_logo <- knitr::image_uri("AFLEARN logo transparent.png")
write_study_detail_pages(
  browse_base, sub_tasks_raw, task_meaning,
  studies_dir = STUDIES_DIR,
  index_url = "../index.html",
  logo_uri = study_logo,
  file_cell = file_cell,
  link_pill = link_pill,
  study_type_label = study_type_label
)
```

```{=html}
<style>
*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; }

body {
  font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif;
  font-size: 16px;
  background: #FFFFFF;
  color: #1F2937;
  margin: 0; padding: 0;
}

#title-block-header { display: none !important; }

.quarto-container, .container-fluid, #quarto-content, main {
  max-width: 100% !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
}

/* ── Logo bar (layer 1 — darkest navy) ───────────────────────────────────── */
.af-logobar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 0.85rem 2rem;
  background: #080056;
}
.af-logo-aflearn {
  height: 96px;
  width: auto;
  max-width: 320px;
  object-fit: contain;
  display: block;
}

/* ── Header (layer 2 — lighter navy) ───────────────────────────────────────── */
.af-header {
  background: #100A78;
  padding: 1.5rem 2rem 1.25rem;
  border-bottom: 3px solid #080056;
}
.af-header-inner {
  display: flex; align-items: flex-start;
  justify-content: space-between; flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 1rem; margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
}
.af-brand    { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.25rem; }
.af-page-title { font-size: 1.35rem; font-weight: 700; color: #FFFFFF; letter-spacing: 0.02em; }
.af-subtitle { font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 400; color: #94A3B8; }
.af-header-actions {
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-end; gap: 0.65rem;
}
.af-cta-btn {
  font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800;
  color: #06003E; background: #FFFFFF;
  padding: 0.6rem 1.15rem; border-radius: 6px;
  text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap;
  transition: background 0.15s;
}
.af-cta-btn:hover { background: #EFF6FF; color: #0A0058; }
.af-meta     { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-end; gap: 0.15rem; }
.af-meta-label { font-size: 0.72rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.09em; color: #64748B; }
.af-meta-value { font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 500; color: #94A3B8; }
.af-description { font-size: 1rem; color: #94A3B8; line-height: 1.65; margin: 0; max-width: 85ch; }
.af-description code {
  font-family: ui-monospace, monospace;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); color: #FFFFFF;
  padding: 0.1em 0.35em; border-radius: 3px; font-size: 0.9em;
}

/* ── Sidebar + main layout ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.af-layout {
  display: flex;
  align-items: stretch;
  min-height: 60vh;
  background: #FFFFFF;
}
.af-sidebar {
  width: 270px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  padding: 1.25rem 1.1rem 1.5rem;
  border-right: 1px solid #E5E7EB;
  background: #FFFFFF;
}
.af-sidebar-title {
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: #0F1F38;
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
  padding-bottom: 0.65rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #E5E7EB;
}
.af-sidebar-count {
  font-weight: 400;
  color: #6B7280;
}
.af-search-wrap {
  position: relative;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}
.af-search-input {
  width: 100%;
  font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif;
  font-size: 15px;
  color: #1F2937;
  padding: 10px 42px 10px 12px;
  border: 1px solid #D1D5DB;
  border-radius: 0;
  background: #FFFFFF;
  outline: none;
}
.af-search-input::placeholder { color: #9CA3AF; }
.af-search-input:focus { border-color: #06003E; }
.af-search-icon {
  position: absolute;
  right: 12px;
  top: 50%;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
  color: #06003E;
  pointer-events: none;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  line-height: 0;
}
.af-main-title {
  background: #100A78;
  color: #FFFFFF;
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  padding: 0.95rem 1.5rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
.af-main {
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 0;
  background: #FFFFFF;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.af-main #browse-table {
  flex: 1 1 auto;
  min-height: 50vh;
}

/* ── Accordion filters (left sidebar) ─────────────────────────────────────── */
.af-filters {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0;
  padding: 0;
  background: transparent;
  border: none;
}
.af-filter-panel {
  border-bottom: 1px solid #E5E7EB;
}
.af-filter-toggle {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  width: 100%;
  padding: 0.85rem 0.25rem;
  border: none;
  background: transparent;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #0F1F38;
}
.af-filter-toggle:hover .af-filter-icon { color: #C8892A !important; }
.af-filter-icon {
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #06003E;
  line-height: 1;
  min-width: 1.25rem;
  text-align: center;
  transition: color 0.15s;
}
.af-filter-body {
  display: none;
  padding: 0 0.25rem 0.85rem;
  max-height: 220px;
  overflow-y: auto;
}
.af-filter-panel.open .af-filter-body { display: block; }
.af-filter-hint {
  font-size: 0.88rem; color: #94A3B8;
  line-height: 1.5; margin: 1rem 0 0;
}
.af-crosstalk .crosstalk-input-checkboxgroup {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.35rem;
}
.af-crosstalk .crosstalk-input-checkboxgroup label {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif !important;
  font-size: 0.95rem !important;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #374151;
  cursor: pointer;
  margin: 0;
}
.af-crosstalk .crosstalk-input-checkboxgroup input[type="checkbox"] {
  width: 15px;
  height: 15px;
  accent-color: #06003E;
  cursor: pointer;
}

/* ── Country flags ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.af-country-cell {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.6rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: #1F2937;
  font-size: 15px;
}
.af-country-flag {
  width: 24px;
  height: 24px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  object-fit: cover;
  border: 1px solid #E5E7EB;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

/* ── Table headers (transparent bar + divider line) ─────────────────────── */
.rt-thead {
  border-bottom: 1px solid #D1D5DB !important;
}
.rt-th {
  background: transparent !important;
  color: #06003E !important;
  font-size: 0.78rem !important;
  font-weight: 800 !important;
  font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif !important;
  text-transform: uppercase !important;
  letter-spacing: 0.07em !important;
  padding: 12px 12px 10px !important;
  border-right: none !important;
  border-bottom: none !important;
  white-space: nowrap !important;
  overflow: visible !important;
}

/* Force every header's inner content div to not wrap */
.rt-th > div,
.rt-th > div > div {
  white-space: nowrap !important;
  overflow: visible !important;
}

/* Resize handle styling */
.rt-th-resize-handle {
  border-right: 2px solid #D1D5DB !important;
  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.15s;
}
.rt-th:hover .rt-th-resize-handle { opacity: 1; }

/* Force the reactable table itself not to compress columns below their set width */
.rt-table {
  min-width: 100%;
  table-layout: auto !important;
}

/* Any header whose inline width style is set must be respected */
.rt-th[style*="width"] {
  flex-shrink: 0 !important;
  min-width: 0 !important;
}
.rt-th:last-child  { border-right: none !important; }
.rt-th:hover       { background: transparent !important; color: #06003E !important; }
.rt-th-sort-icon   { color: #06003E !important; opacity: 0.85; }
.rt-th[aria-sort="ascending"],
.rt-th[aria-sort="descending"] {
  color: #C8892A !important;
}
.rt-th[aria-sort="ascending"] .rt-th-sort-icon,
.rt-th[aria-sort="descending"] .rt-th-sort-icon {
  color: #C8892A !important;
  opacity: 1;
}
.rt-th[aria-sort="ascending"]:hover,
.rt-th[aria-sort="descending"]:hover {
  color: #C8892A !important;
}

/* ── Body rows ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.rt-tr-group       { cursor: pointer; }
.rt-tr         { border-bottom: 1px solid #F0F0F0 !important; transition: background 0.1s; }
.rt-tr:hover   { background: #F9FAFB !important; }
.rt-tr-striped { background: #FAFAFA !important; }
.rt-td {
  padding: 11px 12px !important;
  border-right: 1px solid #F3F4F6 !important;
  vertical-align: middle !important;
  font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif !important;
  font-size: 15px !important;
}
.rt-td:last-child { border-right: none !important; }

.af-row-arrow-svg {
  display: inline-block;
  vertical-align: middle;
}
.af-study-link:hover { color: #1B6FD8 !important; text-decoration: underline !important; }

/* Keep Year / Grade(s) on one line */
.rt-th[style*="width: 100px"],
.rt-td[style*="width: 100px"],
.rt-th[style*="width: 110px"],
.rt-td[style*="width: 110px"],
.rt-th[style*="width: 130px"],
.rt-td[style*="width: 130px"] {
  white-space: nowrap !important;
  flex-shrink: 0 !important;
}

/* ── Legend ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.af-legend {
  display: flex; gap: 1.25rem; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center;
  padding: 0.85rem 2rem;
  background: #FFFFFF;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #E5E7EB;
  font-size: 13px; color: #6B7280;
}
.af-legend-label { font-weight: 700; color: #374151; }

/* ── Footer ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.af-footer {
  padding: 0.9rem 2rem 1.5rem;
  font-size: 0.82rem; color: #9CA3AF;
  border-top: 1px solid #E5E7EB;
  background: #FFFFFF;
}
.af-footer code {
  font-family: ui-monospace, monospace;
  background: #E5E7EB; padding: 1px 4px; border-radius: 3px;
}

@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .af-layout { flex-direction: column; }
  .af-sidebar {
    width: 100%;
    border-right: none;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #E5E7EB;
  }
  .af-logo-aflearn { height: 72px; max-width: 260px; }
}
</style>

<script>
function wireStudySearch() {
  var input = document.getElementById("af-study-search");
  if (!input || input.dataset.wired === "true") return false;
  if (typeof Reactable === "undefined") return false;
  input.dataset.wired = "true";
  input.addEventListener("input", function () {
    Reactable.setSearch("browse-table", input.value);
  });
  return true;
}

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  document.querySelectorAll(".af-filter-toggle").forEach(function (btn) {
    btn.addEventListener("click", function () {
      var panel = btn.closest(".af-filter-panel");
      var open = panel.classList.toggle("open");
      btn.querySelector(".af-filter-icon").textContent = open ? "\u00d7" : "+";
      btn.setAttribute("aria-expanded", open ? "true" : "false");
    });
  });

  if (!wireStudySearch()) {
    var tries = 0;
    var timer = setInterval(function () {
      if (wireStudySearch() || ++tries > 50) clearInterval(timer);
    }, 100);
  }
});

if (window.HTMLWidgets) {
  HTMLWidgets.addPostRenderHandler(function (el) {
    if (el && el.id === "browse-table") wireStudySearch();
  });
}
</script>

<div class="af-legend">
  <span class="af-legend-label">Study type:</span>
  <span style="background:#06003E;color:#fff;font-size:11px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:9px;">Cross-sectional</span>
  <span style="background:#7C3AED;color:#fff;font-size:10px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:9px;">School panel</span>
  <span class="af-legend-label" style="margin-left:0.75rem;">Study design:</span>
  <span style="background:#10B981;color:#fff;font-size:10px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:9px;">Descriptive</span>
  <span style="background:#F59E0B;color:#fff;font-size:10px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:9px;">Pre/Post</span>
  <span style="background:#EF4444;color:#fff;font-size:10px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:9px;">RCT</span>
  <span style="margin-left:auto; color:#94A3B8;">▶ Click a row to open the study detail page</span>
</div>

<div class="af-footer">
  <strong>AFLearn Harmonised EGRA/EGMA Dataset</strong> ·
  DataFirst, University of Cape Town ·
  Access the harmonised dataset via the
  <a href="https://www.datafirst.uct.ac.za/dataportal/index.php" target="_blank" style="color:#06003E; text-decoration:none;">DataFirst Data Portal</a> ·
  Source files via <a href="https://www.datalumos.org" target="_blank" style="color:#06003E; text-decoration:none;">DataLumos</a> ·
  For queries contact <a href="mailto:datafirst@uct.ac.za" style="color:#06003E; text-decoration:none;">datafirst@uct.ac.za</a>
</div>
```
